task: Flagship expert task: Continuous Manufacturing PAT Drift and Real-Time Release Review. Compare PAT predictions vs laboratory results using only the embedded packet. Classify release risk per window and recommend one of: continue_with_heightened_sampling, recalibrate (6h), or divert_to_QC (3h) with a sampling plan. Produce pat_drift_release.xlsx (workbook with executable formulas/logic and intermediate calculations row-by-row) and rtrt_memo.md (concise memo documenting methods, validation checks, uncertainty and sensitivity analyses, and final decision table with pass/warn/fail/needs_review labels). Deliverables must include row-level citations to the embedded packet, validation checks, uncertainty notes, sensitivity checks around controlling thresholds, and explicit unresolved assumptions if any. Do not import external data or invent missing values; use only the embedded packet.
